hero.title: Spaces That Tell A Story Slowly.
hero.description: A curated archive of residences, boutique hotels, heritage interiors and refined commercial spaces. Each project is shaped by the same studio standard: restraint, atmosphere and details that hold after the image has gone.

stats.label: Interiors Completed
stats.text: Delivered across residences, boutique hospitality, heritage commissions and quietly exacting commercial spaces.

stats.label: Active Sectors
stats.text: Residential, hospitality, heritage, commercial and lighting-led interiors selected with equal restraint.

stats.label: Average Lead Time
stats.text: We take on a limited number of commissions so each project keeps its pace, precision and single-steward oversight.

featured.title: Latest Featured Creations
featured.description: Not the largest, and not always the most photographed. These are the commissions that best show how we work: patient rooms, clear atmospheres, and details that keep holding after years of use.

portfolio.title: Our Latest Creations
portfolio.description: Every commission carries its own tone, but the studio language remains constant. Filter the archive to move through residences, hotels, restorations, commercial spaces and light-led commissions.

recognition.title: Press Notices, Clients Feel
recognition.description: We care more about return commissions than awards. These notes map where the work has landed in print, how clients describe it, and which projects keep being revisited.

quote.text: “By dampening the ambient echoes and streamlining the transitions between rooms, they transformed a chaotic city footprint into a deeply intentional, restorative space.”
quote.author: Dani Whitmore

items.title: Architectural Digest
items.description: Villa Serenoa featured for its restrained approach to lakefront luxury.

items.title: Domus
items.description: Casa Bellini noted for its conservation-led restoration strategy.

items.title: Wallpaper*
items.description: Studio Altura listed among Europe's most thoughtful new workspaces.

items.title: Design Excellence Award
items.description: Interior Design Italy recognition for Studio Altura.

items.title: Client Return Rate
items.description: Most new commissions still come through prior clients or their referrals.

items.title: Repeat Collaborations
items.description: Five families have returned for a second property or hospitality commission.
